creator: cem@freebsd.org
text: Ok -- it just dates to initial GCE support 3.5 years ago: r277263.  Not sure why it was explicitly set then, either.  I'd suggest just removing the explicit configuration line unless there is a good reason to have explicit configuration on GCE nowadays.  I did some research and can't find any knowledgebase article about specific cipher requirements on GCE today.
